description: Routine update of personal calendar sync settings. Scope is limited to Kelly West's own account; rollback is simply reverting the setting. Requested by Kelly West.

Migrate counseling appointment records from the legacy ScholarConnect v1 system to the updated ScholarConnect v2 platform. Scope covers Kelly West's active caseload only. Rollback plan: revert to read-only access on v1 for 30 days post-migration. Coordinated with district IT.
short_description: Migrate counseling records to ScholarConnect v2

description: Enable multi-factor authentication on Kelly West's district account per the updated Henrico County security policy effective 2025-12-01. Change involves enrolling an authenticator app and verifying login flow. No data migration required; rollback is MFA disable by IT admin.
short_description: Enable MFA on district account per new security policy
